code:
type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next(_ color: Color) -> Color
  match color
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn color_name(_ color: Color) -> String
  match color
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let c = Color.Red
print(color_name(c))
let c = next(c)
print(color_name(c))
let c = next(c)
print(color_name(c))
let c = next(c)
print(color_name(c))
